message:
fix(crypto): replace UUID-based entropy with direct getrandom and propagate errors as rquickjs::Error

Both crypto_shim.rs and extensions_js.rs used uuid::Uuid::new_v4() as
an entropy source for random byte generation. This was problematic:
Uuid::new_v4() internally calls getrandom but swallows errors via
expect(), and the UUID v4 format stamps version/variant bits into the
output, reducing effective entropy from 128 to 122 bits per 16-byte
block and creating detectable patterns in the output.

crypto_shim.rs changes:
- Replace `use uuid::Uuid` with `use uuid::Builder`
- random_bytes() now returns Result<Vec<u8>, getrandom::Error> and calls
  getrandom::fill directly instead of using UUID as an entropy wrapper
- random_uuid() uses Builder::from_random_bytes() with direct getrandom
  fill, returning Result to propagate OS RNG failures
- Add fill_random_bytes_with<F,E>() generic helper that accepts a fill
  closure, enabling test injection of deterministic or failing entropy
- Add random_uuid_with<F,E>() parallel generic for UUID generation
- Add map_entropy_error() that logs via tracing and converts
  getrandom::Error to rquickjs::Error with structured context
- All three hostcalls (__pi_crypto_random_uuid_native,
  __pi_crypto_random_int_native, __pi_crypto_random_bytes_native) now
  return rquickjs::Result and propagate entropy errors to JS as
  exceptions rather than silently returning zeros
- Add random_bytes_propagates_fill_errors test
- Add random_uuid_propagates_fill_errors test
- Update 6 existing tests to use .expect() on the new Result returns

extensions_js.rs changes:
- Remove `use uuid::Uuid` import
- Replace UUID-chunking random_bytes() with direct getrandom::fill via
  the same fill_random_bytes_with() + random_bytes() pattern
- Add map_crypto_entropy_error() parallel to crypto_shim's version
- Hostcall registration now maps entropy errors via .map_err()
- Add pijs_crypto_random_bytes_are_not_uuid_patterned integration test
  that generates 128 bytes and verifies the output does NOT exhibit
  UUID v4 version/variant bit patterns in 16-byte blocks
- Add pijs_random_bytes_helper_propagates_fill_errors unit test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
